title: --trace-fst causes internal error on unpacked array with shifted index assignment

features.name: unpacked array with non-zero lower bound and shifted index assignment
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declaration with non-zero lower bound (e.g., [DIM2+SHIFT-1:SHIFT]) used with shifted indices in assignment statements

features.name: always_ff with negedge on shifted-indexed signal
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with negedge trigger on a signal accessed with shifted indices

features.name: genvar loop with arithmetic index offset
features.description: Code should include a for loop with genvar using arithmetic expression (e.g., dim2+SHIFT) as array index

features.name: 2D packed array with localparam dimensions and non-zero base
features.description: Code should include a 2D packed array where second dimension uses localparam arithmetic with non-zero lower bound
